case_title: UNITED CALIFORNIA ACCESS & SECURITY VS. INGRAM CONSTRUCTION ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT INGRAM CONSTRUCTION

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO THE AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES AND THE ORDER OF THE COURT ISSUED AT THE LAST CALLING OF THE CASE ON 7/27/16. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE PRO TEM: DEBORAH DANILOFF. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D506).

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,829.00 FILED BY UNITED CALIFORNIA ACCESS & SECURITY AS TO DEFENDANT INGRAM CONSTRUCTION HARMAN NGUYEN, INC. C/O KFC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA ACCESS & SECURITY
REMARK: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER MAILED TO INGRAM CONSTRUCTION ON 06/03/16 RETURNED BY USPS LABELED "RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO PROCESS."
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA ACCESS & SECURITY AS TO DEFENDANT INGRAM CONSTRUCTION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-11-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HARMAN NGUYEN, INC. C/O KFC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA ACCESS & SECURITY AS TO DEFENDANT HARMAN NGUYEN, INC. C/O KFC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-01-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE HAROLD TICKTIN, MANAGER FOR UNITED CALIFORNIA ACCESS & SECURITY, AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE, VINCE INGRAM, OWNER OF INGRAM CONSTRUCTION. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT HARMEN NGUYEN, INC. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. THE COURT SHALL DISMISS THIS MATTER WITH PREJUDICE IF NEITHER PARTY APPEARS AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
